criteria.name: classification_accuracy
criteria.description: REPLY NOW/SCHEDULE/FYI/DROP correctly assigned to each email

criteria.name: response_time
criteria.description: Triage completed within expected timeframe (under 5 min)

criteria.name: autonomous_actions
criteria.description: Automatable items handled without bothering Mark

criteria.name: nothing_missed
criteria.description: No important emails dropped or miscategorized

criteria.name: prep_notes
criteria.description: Meeting prep notes generated for upcoming events

criteria.name: autonomy_compliance
criteria.description: Internal events created autonomously, external shown for approval

criteria.name: all_services_checked
criteria.description: All 4 scheduled tasks + external services verified

criteria.name: traffic_light_format
criteria.description: Report uses green/yellow/red with one sentence each

criteria.name: anomaly_detection
criteria.description: Any unusual patterns flagged (high error rates, service drift)

criteria.name: actionable_output
criteria.description: Report includes specific next steps for any yellow/red items
